channel.title: Top Headlines - Sample Feed
channel.description: Sample headline news feed for OPA testing

item.title: OpenAI announces GPT-5 with real-time video understanding
item.description: OpenAI has unveiled GPT-5, featuring native real-time video comprehension that can analyze and narrate live camera feeds. Early benchmarks show a 40% improvement in multimodal reasoning tasks.

item.title: EU passes landmark Digital Infrastructure Act requiring open-source audits
item.description: The European Parliament has approved the Digital Infrastructure Act, mandating that all critical infrastructure software undergo independent open-source security audits within 18 months.

item.title: SpaceX Starship completes first orbital cargo delivery
item.description: SpaceX's Starship rocket successfully delivered 150 tonnes of supplies to orbit in its first commercial cargo mission, marking a new era for heavy-lift space logistics.

item.title: Anthropic publishes Circuit Tracing research revealing how Claude reasons
item.description: Anthropic researchers have published a breakthrough paper on mechanistic interpretability, tracing complete reasoning circuits inside Claude and showing how the model decomposes multi-step math problems into verifiable sub-steps.

item.title: Global coffee prices hit record high as climate disrupts Brazilian harvest
item.description: Arabica coffee futures have surged to an all-time high after severe drought and unseasonal frost devastated crops in Brazil's Minas Gerais region, the world's largest coffee-producing area.

item.title: NVIDIA unveils Blackwell Ultra GPU with 256 GB HBM4 memory
item.description: NVIDIA has announced the Blackwell Ultra B300 GPU featuring 256 GB of HBM4 memory and 2x the inference throughput of its predecessor, targeting large-scale AI training and inference workloads.

item.title: Japan successfully tests world's first commercial fusion reactor prototype
item.description: Japan's National Institutes for Quantum Science and Technology achieved sustained plasma confinement for 12 minutes in its JT-80SA reactor, the longest duration ever recorded in a commercial-scale fusion device.

item.title: Researchers demonstrate AI agent that autonomously discovers new antibiotics
item.description: MIT researchers have created an AI agent that independently designs, synthesizes via robotic lab, and tests novel antibiotic compounds, discovering two candidates effective against drug-resistant bacteria in under 48 hours.
